summary: Root cause and scope are proven, but the rule that would ship tomorrow (runtime-adapted Option C without stability/OCR gates) has not been offline replay-validated as an integrated package. Implementability audit verdict B, Rolo run 7 FP under stability omission, and re-ingest/persistence paths remain class C unproven.

whatCouldStillGoWrong.description: Shipped rule differs from 100% replay-validated documented Option C combo; runtime proxies at 75% confidence with no integrated offline replay
Omitting hybrid_h_qty_2_stable (required at runtime) causes documented false positive on Rolo transient run 7 on same invoice f0aa5a08
Combo-stress shows Gorgonzola triggers if blocking gates removed; 12/15 effective-paid rows would_fix under unscoped binding
Extraction fix alone does not repair VL persisted qty=2; re-ingest, price history, purchase_quantity, pre-bind unit_price paths marked requires validation
Ricotta operational cost shifts €2.66→€5.31/kg and usable 3→1.5 kg on correction; intentional but downstream propagation unvalidated
Bad-path GPT raw JSON missing; Option C patches binding not GPT; prompt causality unproven

unprovenAssumptions.assumption: Runtime proxy rule equals documented Option C replay rule
Dropping stability gate is safe on Bocconcino invoice
Scope closed at 2 products zero expansion
Full-population replay validates production safety without investigation metadata
Re-ingest propagates corrected qty through ingredients history alerts
Pre-bind unit_price persistence aligns after qty=1 correction
Post-fix 10x Bocconcino stability holds Mezzi Ricotta at qty=1
Root cause is Hybrid H GPT qty inflation not downstream

reasonsNotToImplementNow.title: Validated fix is not the implementable fix
reasonsNotToImplementNow.description: Implementability audit verdict B: three of six documented combo gates are investigation-only RED signals. Tomorrow's code ships adapted proxies at 75% confidence with no integrated offline replay of that package.

reasonsNotToImplementNow.title: Known FP path with no runtime mitigation proof
reasonsNotToImplementNow.description: Rolo run 7 false-positives when stability gate omitted; stability gate cannot run in production; proposed conservative combo not replay-validated to block run 7.

reasonsNotToImplementNow.title: End-to-end correction path unproven
reasonsNotToImplementNow.description: Re-ingest persistence price history and catalog fields marked class C requires validation; VL re-ingest pending post-deploy.

conflictsWithPriorArtifacts.thisReview: NOT READY — runtime proxy gap and stability FP unresolved before ship

conflictsWithPriorArtifacts.thisReview: NOT READY — pre-flight items include unvalidated runtime rule replay

preImplementationGates: Offline replay exact runtime proxy rule (no stability, no passc OCR) on 15-row extract + effective-paid sets including Rolo run 7
Confirm supplier threading into bindMonetaryColumns or document fallback
